title: coniogramme japonica var. gracilis
intro: Coniogramme japonica var. gracilis, also known as the Japanese shield fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Coniogramme japonica var. gracilis include its ability to aid in the treatment of various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. Coniogramme japonica var. gracilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
